FPPC
Jan 21 9:06 AM '92

THE
CAPITOL
CLUB

FOUNDING BOARD OF GOVERNORS

D. Bruce Fife
Chairman
Frank C. Ramos
Vice-Chairman
Carlton Z. Adams, MD
Russell J. Austin
George W. Banks

F. Bradford Kelly
Edward W. Lehman, Jr.
George Macko
Senator Kenneth L. Maddy
John P. Marukas
Edward R. Marszal
Robbie A. Metzger
Alfred G. Merino
William E. Needy
Marvin L. "Buzz" Oates
Robert E. Payne
Joseph H.E P. Plant
M. Scott Reed
Cheri Ross Regan
Hans J. Rochbden
Stephen L. Sax
Gerry Schwartzal
Malcolm S. Segal
Ernest H. Short
Thomas B. Shores
Barbara Strmick
Stephen Tye
William J. Underwood
Ralph E. Vitello
Ming S. Wong

January 17, 1992

Mr. Jay Greenwood
Fair Political Practice Commission
428 J Street, Suite 610
Sacramento, Ca. 95814

Dear Mr. Greenwood:

At the recommendation of Dick Kateliff, I spoke to you in
mid December regarding a review by your commission of a
proposed menu for the Capitol Club. If you recall, I am
trying to develop a menu and pricing structure that will
fit the needs of our Members who are registered lobbyists
with the State of California.

Enclosed is a draft of a menu that we would like to offer
our lobbyist Members. I would like to point out that the
items are selected from our regular menu, and have the
same price. We simply choose items that fit the State
guidelines to include tax and service charge.

I would be grateful if you would review them and offer any
suggestions or comments you may have. It would also be
helpful if you would consider allowing the Club to state
that the FPPC endorses the format pricing.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,

[signature]

Guy H. Shelander
Club Manager

RENAISSANCE TOWER · 901 K STREET · SUITE 2600 · SACRAMENTO CA 95814
916/442-3701
CLUB QUARTERS
25TH AND 26TH FLOORS
